subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: ‘Alaviyyih Khanum, the wife of the martyred Mulla ‘Alí Jan [Mafuzaki], had a dream which she recounted to Jamal Burújirdí. She said, “I dreamt that Jamal Mubarak came to this room and graciously spoke in praise of me.”
subcodes.first_line_orig: علویه خانم عیال ملا علی جان شهید خوابی دیده بود و برای جمال بروجردی نقل کرده بود
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @humor; jokes, @accounts of dreams and visions
